title: The Op Mod - A Beginners Dream
description:
The Op Mod - Beginners Dream offers an overpowered yet beginner-friendly experience with unique ores, mysterious creatures, and exciting new features.
My Side Project now.
body:
- **Thank you all for 450+ Downloads**

- Check the Legacy Textures Out (Outdated/Abandoned, you are allowed to make your own Updates)! : https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-op-mod-legacy-textures

Have you ever played Minecraft and noticed the lack of peaceful features for beginners?

That’s where this mod comes in! It introduces a brand-new dimension filled with exciting content, making the game more beginner-friendly while adding depth to exploration.
Features of the Mod:

> **MISC** :
  - Painting of Atomic Powerplant
  - DEV : Placeholder Block
  - German Translation

> **Dimension 1**: Descending Ore Dimension   
-   **New Elements**:
    Unique trees, Ores **(Netlus at Heights 30-70,Uranium at Heights 75-85)**, flowers,creatures like the **Atomic Cow**,**Nuclear Powerplant**, **Abandoned House** and **Camp** Structures
  - **Portal Components**:
      Constructed using **Granite** and a **Descending Battery** (recipe in the Gallery)
  - **Netlus Use-Cases** :
      Armor,Pickaxe,Axe,Sword,Shovel
  - **Uranium Use-Cases** :
      Use it as a Coal Alternative (Burn Time **6 Minutes**)
> **Dimension 2**: Cold Madness Dimension
  - Straya Resource
    - This Resource currently has 9 Items/Blocks
      - Straya Tools : Diamond Tier
      - Straya Ore : Requires Iron or Netlus Pickaxe to break and drop Raw Straya (or better Pickaxe)
      - Raw Straya : Melt in Furnace to get Straya Ingot
      - Straya Ingot : Can be crafted into Straya Block
      - Straya Block : can/should be used as an Ice/Blue Ice Alternative for Boat Highways
  - **Contains Elements of Dimension 1**
  - Customized Elements of Dimension 1 : Powerplant (**Snowy Variant**), Abandoned House (**Snowy Variant**), Camps (**Snowy Variant**)
  - **Portal** : Netlus Blocks , **Atomic Key** (Uncraftable)
  - Custom Trees made of **Frost Wood Logs and Leaves**
> **Dimension 3**: Mighty Skys Dimension (Currently in further Devlopment)
  - Cloud Blocks
  - Portal
      - Straya Block Frame and Ignite it with a **Rocket Computer** (Recipe in Gallery)
 
1.21.1 is discontinued,1.21.1 Build will only be released if i think it´s important,Backports have a "b" at the end of the version and Experimental/Untested Versions an "x" (**1.21.1 = Legacy Builds ,1.21.4 / 1.21.5 = New Builds**)

(If somebody wants to help me find Names for some Items or Make some Textures for the Mod DM me - acnhgamrr)
- Basic Showcase by me here(OUTDATED) : [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hyAYWpEDutA](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hyAYWpEDutA)

## **_LICENSE_**
> 
> **You are Allowed to** :
  - Use this Mod for Youtube Videos and such but you have to credit the Mod (via a Link or my Username on Modrinth)
  - Create Resourcepacks without my Permission that change the Textures/Models that my Mod already has
> **You are NOT Allowed to** :
  -   Upload the compiled Mod to another Platform without my Permission
  -   Use my Assets for your Own/Commercial use without my Permission
,you can obtain Permission by DM´ing me on Discord
